best_fit: Repetitive packaging and food-beverage SME lines
main_strength: Maps real downtime-event structure directly to lean scenario prioritization and quantifies uncertainty with bootstrap intervals.
main_limitation: Does not directly model quality, WIP, labor, or cost, and lean effects remain scenario assumptions rather than measured post-implementation outcomes.

primary_kpis: WIP; Lead time; Throughput; Defect rate
best_fit: High-mix aerospace and context-sensitive manufacturing systems
main_strength: Covers a broad KPI set and explicitly tests lean-tool sensitivity under market, demand, and resource uncertainty.
main_limitation: Requires heavier co-simulation setup and is less accessible for low-resource SME studies using open plant data.

method_family: Mixed case study plus simulation for lean-tool selection
best_fit: SME process-improvement planning with moderate modeling burden
main_strength: Managerially interpretable and practical for choosing lean-tool combinations in an SME setting.
main_limitation: Publicly visible methodology descriptions provide less KPI detail and less event-level downtime specificity than the present study.

method_family: Hybrid system dynamics and discrete-event simulation
industry_basis: Lean manufacturing case with production-pressure effects
best_fit: Plants where workforce behavior and scheduling pressure shape performance
main_strength: Captures human factors, policy feedback loops, and quality-throughput trade-offs better than downtime-only methods.
main_limitation: More difficult to calibrate and less directly tied to event-level downtime logs or simple SME datasets.

method_family: Digital twin plus automated value-stream mapping
primary_kpis: Non-value-added time; Resource utilization; Process monitoring
best_fit: Digitally instrumented smart-factory cells needing live process visibility
main_strength: Uses machine-connected data for real-time monitoring and dynamic value-stream optimization.
main_limitation: Digital-twin infrastructure raises complexity and cost, making it less accessible for typical SMEs.

method_family: Survey-based SEM across food and beverage SMEs
industry_basis: 113 food and beverage SMEs in Tanzania
primary_kpis: Output improvement; Waste reduction; Lean-process adoption
best_fit: Sector-level benchmarking and policy guidance for food and beverage SMEs
main_strength: Provides broader cross-firm generalizability in the food-and-beverage SME context.
main_limitation: Not designed for plant-level what-if simulation or event-level downtime prioritization.

primary_kpis: Production time; Mean throughput per day; Throughput per operator
best_fit: Labor-intensive assembly lines where balancing and operator productivity dominate
main_strength: Strong for operator-level throughput, balancing, and labor productivity problems.
main_limitation: Less informative for automated, downtime-dominated packaging lines with sparse labor bottlenecks.
